headline: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Opens 427,000 Square Foot San Diego Hub For AI Drug Discovery
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) is rolling out new AI infrastructure built on NVIDIA's latest architecture to support drug discovery. The company is applying this technology across oncology, cardiovascular disease and other core therapeutic areas. Bristol Myers Squibb has opened a 427,000 square foot R&D hub at the Campus Point Megacampus in San Diego. The new site is intended to bring together research teams and laboratory capacity in a single large West Coast center. Bristol Myers Squibb...

headline: What to Watch in Pfizer's Non-Oncology Portfolio This Earnings Season
summary: Pfizer's non-oncology portfolio faced mixed Q2 trends. Eliquis and Vyndaqel sales may have risen while COVID products will have declined.
